title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at UPS India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at UPS India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at UPS India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About UPS India:
UPS India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UPS India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
